text: Standing in this sleek, modern environment, I am struck by a sense of curiosity. The glass walls and vibrant displays invite exploration. The R+D exhibit on research and development makes me reflect on the ever-evolving relationship between humans and intelligent machines. I feel a mix of anticipation and contemplation—excited about technological progress, but also aware of the philosophical questions it raises about coexistence and understanding. The space feels both impersonal and thoughtful, designed to stimulate inquiry.
